name: CBAK Energy Technology, Inc.
summary: CBAK Energy Technology, Inc. is a Nevada-incorporated holding company that conducts battery manufacturing operations through subsidiaries in China. Its principal subsidiaries include Dalian CBAK Power Battery Co., Ltd. (CBAK Power), Zhejiang Hitrans Lithium Battery Technology (Hitrans, 73.46% owned), and Nanjing BFD New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. The company produces lithium batteries, including NCM (nickel cobalt manganese) battery products, serving energy technology markets through its PRC-based operating entities.

products.name: NCM Lithium Batteries
products.description: Nickel cobalt manganese lithium batteries produced by PRC subsidiaries for energy technology applications.
